message:
fix(surface): replace try_into().unwrap() with saturating cast for line length

ClusteredLine::len is u32 but accumulated from usize cell widths. On
pathologically long lines (>4B cells), try_into() would panic. Use
.min(u32::MAX) as u32 for safe clamping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
